title: Senior Teacher - IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services!
